theme_and_archetype.description: A precision-focused, highly legible technical design. Designed for musicians comparing fine tonal differences. High contrast red against deep void black.

layout_and_spacing.widget: Contained layout intended for Shopify embed. Max-width 600px, bg-[#121212], border border-white/10, subtle drop-shadow. Scrollable tracklist inside `max-h-[400px]` with custom minimal scrollbar. Sticky playback control bar at the bottom with synced progress slider.
layout_and_spacing.admin_dashboard: Sidebar or top-nav bento grid layout. Dense track table using Shadcn Table component. Form components using Shadcn UI.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Flat solid surfaces with sharp edges (rounded-sm maximum). 1px subtle white/10 borders to separate elements.

components.progress_bar: Use Shadcn Slider. Override standard blue to accent `#d62028`. Background track to `#262626`.
components.track_row: Flex layout. 48x48px square image on left. Title and Artist stacked vertically. Play indicator when active. Hover background `bg-[#1C1C1C]`.
components.buttons: Shadcn Button. Primary: `bg-[#d62028] text-white hover:bg-[#b81c22] border-none`. Secondary: `bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5`.
components.forms: Admin dashboard requires Shadcn inputs, selects, dialog for adding/editing tracks.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Track rows transition smoothly `transition-colors duration-200`. Buttons scale down slightly on active.
motion_and_interaction.playhead: Continuous smooth update. When a user clicks a new track, the playhead stays synced (e.g., if switching at 0:30, new track starts at 0:30).

icons.instructions: Use for Play, Pause, Skip, Edit, Trash, Plus, Settings. Weight should be technical and clean (stroke-width 2).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build two views: Viewer Widget (Shopify embeddable) and Admin Dashboard (for managing tracks).
Strictly adhere to the dark theme #121212 background and #d62028 accent.
Implement a global audio context or synchronized state for the widget. When switching tracks, the `currentTime` of the audio element must remain synced across the tracks.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="play-button"`, `data-testid="track-row-1"`).
Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Install via @fontsource or google fonts.
Make the track list scrollable with a max-height (e.g., max-h-[400px]) to handle 10+ tracks cleanly.
Use Shadcn slider for the progress bar and style the filled portion with the #d62028 accent.
Ensure the square images for tracks do not stretch (use object-cover).
